name: plgg-poc5-config
description: PoC 5 of the plggpress confidence-collection fleet: the writer's agent maintains the site's CENTRAL CONFIGURATION as typed data — front-matter tag classification (name/color/emoji/description), path exclusions, and layout + prefixed sizing themes — and the sample site re-renders live. A pure typed-command parser drives every config op deterministically (headless-replayable); the Realtime voice session emits the same ops as a bonus.
author: qmu
